steps.description: Click on the "Copilot connectors" option in the "New Project" dropdown menu to embed organization data into Microsoft 365 Copilot.
Type text: 'testgc' into the "Add a connector name" input field in the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface, located within the guided tutorial section for building declarative agents.
Press the 'Enter' key to confirm the connector name input ("testgc") in the "Add a connector name" text field within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface.
Type text: 'testgc01' into the input field labeled "Add a connection ID" at the top of the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface. Confirm the input by pressing 'Enter' or cancel using 'Escape'.
Press the 'Enter' key to confirm the input in the connection ID text field within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface.

Press the "Enter" key to confirm the selection of the workspace folder ("Default folder: /home/vscode/AgentsToolkitProjects") in the "Workspace Folder" dialog within Visual Studio Code, as part of the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit setup.
